text.nodata_description: It looks like you don't have any workflows. Get started by adding one.
text.unpublished_warning: Please complete the orchestration and publish the changes first
text.running_prompt: Running... Please check the history later

page.heading: Workflows
page.subheading: Workflows are collections of nodes that automate a process. Workflows begin execution when a trigger condition occurs and execute sequentially to achieve complex tasks.

delete.modal.title: Delete "{{name}}"
delete.modal.content:
Are you sure want to delete this workflow?
This action cannot be undone.

batch_delete.modal.title: Delete workflows
batch_delete.modal.content:
Are you sure want to delete these {{count}} selected workflows?
This action cannot be undone.

execute.modal.title: Execute workflow
execute.modal.content: You have unpublished changes. Do you really want to execute this workflow based on the last published version?

new.heading: Create Workflow
new.subheading: Using a workflow to monitor, apply, deploy and notify.

templates.title: Choose a Template
templates.subtitle: Use these template workflows to quickly initialize your automated certificate management workflow.

standard.title: Standard template
standard.description: A standard operating procedure that includes application, deployment, and notification steps.

certtest.title: Monitoring template
certtest.description: A monitoring operating procedure that includes monitoring, and notification steps.

modal.title: Publish changes
modal.content: Are you sure to publish your changes?

modal.title: Rollback changes
modal.content: Are you sure to rollback your changes to the last published version?

errmsg.invalid: Please enter a valid graph content
errmsg.first_node_start: The first node must be a start node
errmsg.last_node_end: The last node must be an end node
errmsg.duplicate_start: The start node must be unique

uncompleted_design.alert: The orchestration is not ready. Please check if there are any nodes not configured.

unpublished_draft.alert: The orchestration is not released yet.

unsaved_changes.confirm: You have unsaved changes. Do you really want to close the panel and drop those changes?
